data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for automatic payments, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions a subscription model, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the existence of an automatic payment feature. This indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement for automatic payments, as no evidence supports its validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of automatic payment functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
